Metadata.title: Horizon — See the world in full color
Metadata.description: Horizon Travels curates immersive journeys around the globe, connecting travelers with authentic experiences and seamless planning.

Hero.badge: See the world in full color
Hero.description: Iconic landscapes, breathtaking views, and unforgettable places. Horizon connects you to destinations made to be seen, felt, and remembered.

Services.title: Our
Services.description: Every journey we create is thoughtfully curated around experiences, not itineraries. From immersive cultures to untamed landscapes and tailor-made escapes, each path is designed to feel personal, effortless, and unforgettable.
Services.scroll_hint: Scroll down to see our services

wild.title: Wild Escapes
wild.description: From dramatic landscapes to remote destinations, these journeys are designed for exploration, freedom, and connection with nature.

culture.title: Cultural Immersion
culture.description: Immersive experiences rooted in history, art, gastronomy, and local traditions. Crafted for travelers who want to understand the soul of a destination.

urban.title: Urban Pulse
urban.description: Vibrant cities, modern culture, architecture, and creative scenes. Perfect for travelers drawn to design, lifestyle, and urban energy.

bespoke.title: Bespoke Journeys
bespoke.description: Fully customized journeys built around your interests, pace, and travel style. No templates. Just experiences designed around you.

WhyChooseUs.title: Why Choose
WhyChooseUs.description: Travel designed with intention, depth, and meaning.

experts.title: Curated by Experts
experts.description: Every journey is thoughtfully designed by travel specialists with deep local knowledge and global perspective.

trusted.title: Trusted & Seamless
trusted.description: From planning to arrival, every detail is handled with care, transparency, and reliability.

standards.title: Exceptional Standards
standards.description: We partner only with experiences, guides, and stays that meet our highest quality benchmarks.

planning.title: Effortless Planning
planning.description: Complex itineraries made simple. We remove friction so you can focus on the experience.

pace.title: Your Time, Your Pace
pace.description: Journeys designed around your rhythm, interests, and and travel style — never rushed, never generic.

personal.title: Truly Personal
personal.description: No templates, no mass tourism. Every trip is shaped around who you are and how you want to travel.

patagonia.title: Patagonia
patagonia.subtitle: Untamed landscapes at the edge of the world

Stats.title: Horizon in Numbers
Stats.description: Celebrating the journeys, destinations, and unforgettable experiences of our travelers worldwide.

MaskReveal.description: Discover hidden gems, breathtaking views, and moments that turn into lifelong memories.

TabbedTrips.title: Selected
TabbedTrips.description: Curated experiences for every traveler. Explore our top destinations.

Contact.description: Questions, suggestions, or ready to start your next adventure? Our team is here to help you explore the world.
Contact.speak_desc: We are here to help you plan your next dream adventure.

fields.placeholder_message: Tell us about your dream destination...

Contact.success: Your message has been sent! We'll contact you soon.
Contact.error: Please fill all required fields correctly.

Footer.newsletter_desc: Get the latest travel tips and offers directly in your inbox.
Footer.description: Explore the world with curated experiences, expert guidance, and unforgettable journeys.
